props.fixed: Pins the bar to the top of the viewport.
props.shadowScroll: Shows the shadow only once the page has scrolled.
props.hideScroll: Slides the bar away when scrolling down, back when scrolling up.
props.paddingScroll: Extra vertical padding that compresses once the page scrolls.
props.targetScroll: CSS selector of the scroll container (defaults to the window).

events.update:modelValue: Emitted when an item is activated.
